emails.subject: RE: Estate Power Curves
emails.body: Kevin, I think that is fine but what happens when the deal becomes final. Will we definitively be given access to your curves? Of course that would be easier but we have been given conflicting information on this one. We were told that this information would be considered proprietary and that we could not depend on receiving curves all the time. Thanks, Paul

emails.subject: RE: Estate Power Curves
emails.body: I think you are probably correct. Upon closure, you will probably be marking your own curves. Having said that, you should probably begin now.

emails.subject: RE: Estate Power Curves
emails.body: RE: Estate Power Curves Thanks Paul Racicot
